title: QuizPulse
description: Real-time quiz platform with OTP authentication, live leaderboards, scalable multi-user sessions.
overview: QuizPulse is a full-stack real-time quiz platform built for engaging multi-user quiz sessions. It includes OTP-based authentication, live leaderboard updates, and scalable deployment using Docker. The system focuses on responsiveness, performance, and smooth real-time interactions.

title: Dev Portfolio
description: A premium dark-themed developer portfolio with JSON architecture and Framer Motion effects.
overview: A fully responsive developer portfolio designed with a premium glassmorphism aesthetic. Built using reusable JSON-driven architecture, smooth Framer Motion animations, and a modular component structure to create a modern user experience.

title: Kubera
description: UPI-inspired micro-investment platform that automatically rounds transactions and invests spare change.
overview: Kubera is a mobile-first fintech platform inspired by modern payment systems like GPay and PhonePe. It simulates digital payments, calculates round-up spare change, stores investment pools, and automatically triggers investments when thresholds are reached. The platform includes payment simulation, dashboard analytics, investment management, card systems, and admin monitoring.
challenges: Managing spare pool and threshold-based investment workflows
learned: System design and fintech workflow architecture

title: Flappy Bird
tagline: Classic arcade game recreated in Unity
description: A Flappy Bird clone built with Unity 6 and C#, featuring physics-based movement, procedural obstacle spawning, score tracking, and game-over management.
overview: Flappy Bird is a recreation of the popular arcade game developed using Unity 6 and C#. The project focuses on core game development concepts including Rigidbody physics, collision detection, obstacle generation, trigger-based scoring, UI management, and scene reloading. Players must navigate through continuously spawning pillars while achieving the highest possible score.
challenges: Creating a dynamic pillar spawning system
Handling game-over states and replay functionality
Optimizing obstacle cleanup for continuous gameplay
learned: Prefab instantiation and object lifecycle management
Scene management and gameplay state control

title: Cube Runner
tagline: Fast-paced endless runner built with Unity
description: A 3D endless runner game featuring lane-based movement, obstacle avoidance, score tracking, game-over mechanics, and responsive UI systems.
overview: Cube Runner is a 3D endless runner game developed in Unity 6 using C#. Players control a cube that continuously moves forward while avoiding colored obstacles and navigating through increasingly challenging paths. The project focuses on game mechanics, collision systems, UI management, scene control, score tracking, and player movement using Unity's physics engine. It also includes start menus, game-over screens, restart functionality, camera follow systems, and modular obstacle design using prefabs.
challenges: Managing continuous forward movement with physics
Creating reliable collision detection and obstacle handling
Designing responsive UI panels and score displays
Synchronizing gameplay state with UI interactions
learned: Prefab creation and level design principles
Scene management and game state control
Performance optimization for endless runner gameplay
